/usr/bin/c++  -O0 -g3 -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/aethercli.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o aethercli  -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /opt/homebrew/Cellar/brotli/1.2.0/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/brotli/1.2.0/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/brotli/1.2.0/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
